content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be well-centered on the track entering the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 22 + 5 = 27
Waypoint 27: (7.010037, 1.025767)
Car position: (6.351624, 0.694883)
Bearing = atan2(1.025767 - 0.694883, 7.010037 - 6.351624) = atan2(0.330884, 0.658413) = atan2(0.5025) ≈ 26.67°
Current heading: 5.724°
Delta = 26.67 - 5.724 = 20.95° → moderate left needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead with car well-centered (distance_from_center=0.003); delta to waypoint 27 is +20.95° (left), so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve.",

    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is nearly perfectly centered on track throughout the straight",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-25° entering curve at speed 1.5",
    "After the right curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves",
    "Waypoints 0-21 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",
    "Curve sharpens at wp27-32 (y increases from 1.0 to 1.7), may need more steering soon",
    "Car heading increases from ~0° to ~5.7° confirming we are entering the left curve",
    "Delta ~21° at wp27 confirms entering the curve — maintain moderate left steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.0516, 6.1475, 6.2484, 6.3516],
    "y": [0.6526, 0.6570, 0.6706, 0.6949],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 20.95,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
